title: evolvulus rutenbergianus
intro: Evolvulus rutenbergianus, also known as the East African dwarf morning glory, is a flowering plant species native to tropical Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional African medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant's leaves and roots are rich in bioactive compounds, which have been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, contributing to its health benefits, including reduced inflammation and improved immune function. Evolvulus rutenbergianus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
